title: Ad Space
description: Modpack containing Ad Astra and optimization.
body:
This modpack is mostly optimizations, but does contain As Astra which is the main focus, this modpack also contains some QoL mods, and some resource packs to make the world look better. This modpack is only in 1.20.1 since some of the mods have not been update to 1.20.2

Mod(s) out side of modrinth:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory

Resource Pack(s):
https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
